mapper.select: /* on.standard.system.menu.selectMenuList */ SELECT MENU_DIV_CD menuDivCd , MENU_SERNO menuSerno , MENU_CD menuCd , CASE WHEN UPR_MENU_CD = '00000000' THEN NULL ELSE UPR_MENU_CD END uprMenuCd , KOR_NM korNm , ENG_NM engNm , MENU_CL menuCl , MENU_PARAM menuParam , MENU_CSS menuCss , LAY_OUT layOut , URL_ADDR urlAddr , RTN_URL rtnUrl , MENU_TARGET menuTarget , SORT_NO sortNo , MENU_COMMENT menuComment , MENU_FUNC_DIV menuFuncDiv , MENU_FUNC_CD menuFuncCd , (SELECT BOARD_KOR_NM FROM STB_SM_BOARDTYPE_MNG WHERE BOARD_CD = SMMH.MENU_FUNC_CD ) boardFuncNM , USE_YN useYn , LEVEL level , SORT_PATH sortPath , MENU_PATH menuPath , MENU_CD_PATH menuCdPath , IS_LEAF isLeaf FROM SVI_MENU_MNG_HIERARCHY SMMH WHERE MENU_DIV_CD = #{menuDivCd} AND MENU_CL != 'ROOT' ORDER BY SORT_PATH
